/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/ScreenCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/SystemInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/GpuFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/PreviewModule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/printscr.dir/OutputModule.cpp.o -o printscr  -ld3d11 -ldxgi -ldwmapi -lwindowsapp /home/runner/work/printscr/printscr/deps/lib/libEGL.lib /home/runner/work/printscr/printscr/deps/lib/libGLESv2.lib /home/runner/work/printscr/printscr/deps/lib/zlib.lib
